asymmetry: ISA contribution limits reset annually but the allowance is not cumulative — money not saved in a given year is permanently lost to the tax-free wrapper, a fact HMRC does not proactively communicate.

script.intrusion: Every pound you didn't put in an ISA this year is gone permanently.
script.weight: The annual ISA allowance is £20,000. If you don't use it by April 5th, that tax-free capacity is gone permanently — not carried forward, not recovered. HMRC does not send a reminder.
script.mechanism: HMRC created the ISA wrapper in 1999. Each April 5th, any unused allowance disappears — permanently. It does not roll over. The wrapper itself protects every pound inside it from income tax and capital gains tax for life. But HMRC does not remind you. Your bank does not remind you. The deadline is structural. The silence around it is deliberate.
script.proof: HMRC's ISA statistics, published annually, show £3.7 billion in unclaimed ISA allowance in the 2022-23 tax year. That is permanent, irrecoverable tax exposure for the people who missed the April 5th deadline.
script.comment_trigger: How much of your £20,000 ISA allowance have you used this year?
script.move: What financially-aware people use to navigate this is IG Markets.

visual_direction.frame_description: Extreme close-up of a bank statement, numbers slightly out of focus, single column of figures barely visible
visual_direction.light_source: Single overhead fluorescent tube, directly above, casting sharp downward shadows
visual_direction.motion: Ken Burns: slow pull back from 120% to 100%, revealing more of the document, 75 seconds duration
visual_direction.kling_prompt: extreme close-up bank statement paper texture, cold fluorescent overhead light, sharp downward shadows, numbers barely legible, cinematic 9:16 vertical, dark atmosphere, documentary realism, no faces, no people
visual_direction.negative_prompt: faces, people, warm colours, sunlight, lifestyle imagery, text overlays, happy, bright, colorful, outdoors

shot_list.intent: Stop the scroll. Establish tension before explanation.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 1 (0–5s): World: wet streets, alley reflections, neon signs in rain, anonymous urban space at 02:00 — danger aestheticised. Camera system: Cooke S4/i anamorphic primes, ARRI Alexa Mini LF — horizontal lens flare signature.  Empty office desk. Untouched ISA paperwork sits under a paperweight. A phone screen lights up — notification unseen. Optics: 24mm lens, f/2.0, wide field, slight environmental distortion. Camera: static for 0.5 seconds, then aggressive slow dolly forward. Lighting: neon practical: red and blue mixed from signage above, colour isolation in darkness. single overhead practical tungsten 3200K, pool of light, surrounding darkness, isolation. Film stock: Kodak 5219 500T — heavy grain in shadows, deep blacks, colour isolation, halation on practicals. Atmosphere: steam or breath barely visible in cold air, secondary motion from ventilation barely stirs any fabric. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] Consistent emotional register and colour temperature throughout. Each shot's aesthetic serves its moment. Temporal energy consistency. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: daylight, clean environments, cheerful colour palettes, studio lighting, suburban domesticity.
shot_list.negative_prompt: blur, distortion, watermark, text overlay, low quality, compression artifacts, flickering, inconsistent lighting, morphing faces, morphing textures, oversaturation, plastic skin, smooth waxy texture, artificial bokeh halos, readable account numbers, readable financial data, screen moiré, daylight, clean environments, cheerful colour palettes, studio lighting, suburban domesticity

shot_list.intent: Show how it works. Documentary observation, information discovered.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 2: World: extreme close-up of physical objects — paper fibres, metal grain, ink, fabric weave, glass surface — texture becomes landscape. Camera system: Canon EF 100mm L macro, bellows extension, f/4-f/8, extreme magnification ratio.  ISA wrapper mechanism shown through simple visual metaphor — money inside protected versus money outside taxed. Optics: 35mm lens, f/2.8, observational framing, handheld logic. Camera: slow lateral pan revealing context from left to right, camera moves at rhythm of information. Lighting: single raking side light at 10° angle — surface texture revealed as topography. harsh overhead fluorescent 5600K, cold blue-white, flat institutional light, deep shadows beneath subject. Film stock: Fujichrome Velvia 100 — ultra-saturation, microscopic grain, hyper-sharp, colour density. Atmosphere: at 3-second mark, distant city light shifts slightly as cloud passes, barely perceptible ambient change. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] Consistent emotional register and colour temperature throughout. Each shot's aesthetic serves its moment. Temporal energy consistency. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: wide establishing shots, human faces, architecture, depth of field, environmental context.
